home.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about the Wednesday Drop.

faqs.a: Our algorithm doesn't just look at 'likes'. It analyzes your interests, values, and even your weekly availability. We aim for high-signal connections that have a high probability of a great first campus meet.
Yes. To ensure safety and a community of peers, we only allow students from supported Hong Kong universities with valid institutional emails.

faqs.q: Why only one match per week?
faqs.a: Endless browsing leads to decision fatigue and shallow connections. By giving you one intentional match every Wednesday, we help you focus on really getting to know one person at a time.

faqs.q: What if I get a bad match?
faqs.a: You're always in control. After every drop, you can provide feedback. If you identify as a 'pass' or 'rematch', our algorithm learns your preferences for the next cycle. Safety and comfort are our top priorities.
We always suggest safe, public spots on your own campus. Keep it low-pressure, keep it public, and keep it under an hour for the first meet.
